## Checklist

- [ ] This PR has a single primary purpose
- [ ] Cross-module contract changes are reflected in `docs/spec/` and/or `docs/interfaces/`
- [ ] Parallel-development constraints in `docs/process/feishu_gui_agent_parallel_dev_playbook.md` are still respected
- [ ] I ran the minimum local checks required by `CONTRIBUTE.md`
- [ ] If Python execution paths changed, I ran `black --check gui_agents` locally or explained why I could not
- [ ] If behavior changed, I attached minimal verification evidence or clearly stated the limitation
